value.title: Sapiom raises $15M to help AI agents buy their own tech tools
value.content: The startup -- with backing from Accel -- is building a financial layer that handles the authentication and micro-payments required for AI agents.

value.title: a16z VC wants founders to stop stressing over insane ARR numbers
value.content: Andreessen Horowitz VC Jennifer Li⁠, who oversees some of the firm's fastest-growing AI companies, warns founders not to believe every ARR claim made on X.

value.title: Secondary sales shift from founder windfalls to employee-retention tools
value.content: AI startups like Clay and ElevenLabs are using early liquidity to keep their best talent.

value.title: Fundamental raises $255M Series A with a new take on big data analysis
value.content: Fundamental has built a new foundation model to solve an old problem: how to draw insights from the huge quantities of structured data produced by enterprises.

value.title: Mundi Ventures closes on €750M for Kembara, its largest deep tech and climate fund
value.content: Spain-based deeptech and climate megafund Kembara has just completed a €750 million first close toward its €1 billion target.

value.title: A16z just raised $1.7B for AI infrastructure. Here’s where it’s going.
value.content: Andreessen Horowitz just raised a whopping ⁠new $15 billion in funding⁠. And a $1.7 billion chunk of that is going to its ⁠infrastructure team⁠, the one responsible for some of its biggest, most prominent AI investments including Black Forrest Labs, Cursor, OpenAI, ⁠ElevenLabs⁠, Ideogram, ⁠Fal⁠ and dozens of others.   A16z ⁠general partner with the infra team Jennifer Li⁠ (who oversees such investments as ElevenLabs – just valued at $11 billion); Ideagram and Fal, has a clear thesis on where the team is looking […]

value.title: What a16z is actually funding (and what it’s ignoring) when it comes to AI infra
value.content: Andreessen Horowitz just raised a whopping new $15 billion in funding. And a $1.7 billion chunk of that is going to its infrastructure team, the one responsible for some of its biggest, most prominent AI investments, including Black Forest Labs, Cursor, OpenAI, ElevenLabs, Ideogram, Fal, and dozens of others.   a16z general partner with the infra team Jennifer Li (who oversees such investments as ElevenLabs — just valued at $11 billion) has a clear thesis on where the team is looking to […]

value.title: ElevenLabs raises $500M from Sequoia at an $11 billion valuation
value.content: ElevenLabs' valuation has raised more than three times in the last 12 months.

value.title: SNAK Venture Partners raises $50M fund to back vertical marketplaces
value.content: The firm has already invested in six companies, including BigRentals and Repackify, focused on equipment rental and packaging logistics, respectively.

value.title: The Minneapolis tech community holds strong during ‘tense and difficult time’
value.content: Founders and investors in the Minneapolis tech industry told TechCrunch they've put much of their work on hold to help out their community.

value.title: YC startups can now receive investment in stablecoin
value.content: All startups accepted into YC will soon have the option to receive their seed checks via stablecoins.

value.title: How Tether became crypto’s most profitable company — and what it’s building next
value.content: This week on StrictlyVC Download, Connie Loizos talks with Paolo Ardoino, CEO of Tether, the company behind USDT, the world’s largest stablecoin. With 536 million users globally, Tether has quietly become one of crypto’s most powerful players — and now it’s evolving far beyond stablecoins. Ardoino is transforming Tether into what he calls “the stable […]

value.title: 2026 plans: What’s next for Startup Battlefield 200
value.content: See what to expect for Startup Battlefield 200 in 2026, the ultimate startup pitch competition on the global stage at TechCrunch Disrupt. Join the mailing list to be the first to know when applications drop.

value.title: Lotus Health nabs $35M for AI doctor that sees patients for free
value.content: This AI doctor is licensed in all 50 states, the startup says. The deal was led by CRV and Kleiner Perkins.

value.title: Peak XV says internal disagreement led to partner exits as it doubles down on AI
value.content: Peak XV is transitioning board roles and opening a U.S. office while continuing to view India as its largest market.

value.title: Two Stanford students launch $2M startup accelerator for students nationwide
value.content: "Breakthrough’s purpose is to fill in the funding and opportunity gap that exists in many of these ecosystems because students have historically lacked access to capital and the networks required to launch their entrepreneurial pursuits," co-founder Roman Scott said.

value.title: a16z partner Kofi Ampadu to leave firm after TxO program pause
value.content: Ampadu's departure perhaps signals the end of the TxO chapter. The fund and program focused on supporting underserved founders by providing access to tech networks and investment capital through a donor-advised fund.

value.title: A peek inside Physical Intelligence, the startup building Silicon Valley’s buzziest robot brains
value.content: If co-founder Lachy Groom has any doubts, he doesn’t show it. He’s working with people who've been working on this problem for decades and who believe the timing is finally right, which is all he needs to know.

value.title: Reid Hoffman urges Silicon Valley leaders to stop bending the knee to President Trump
value.content: Some Valley CEOs have condemned recent border patrol events, but Hoffman urges them to wield their influence more powerfully.

value.title: Last 24 hours to grab your plus-one pass at 50% off to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
value.content: Today is the last day to lock in a plus-one pass at 50% off to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, happening on October 13-15 in San Francisco.
